cards.front: What is the meaning of \forall (for all)?
cards.back: A universal quantifier that applies to every element in a set

cards.front: What is the meaning of \exists (there exists)?
cards.back: An existential quantifier that asserts the existence of at least one element in a set

cards.front: What is the meaning of \in (element of)?
cards.back: A relation that denotes membership of an element in a set

cards.front: What is the meaning of \subset (subset of)?
cards.back: A relation that denotes a subset is contained within another set

cards.front: What is the meaning of \subseteq (subset of or equal to)?
cards.back: A relation that denotes a subset is either contained within or equal to another set
